title: carlina vulgaris subsp. spinosa
intro: Carlina vulgaris subsp. spinosa, also known as the prickly carline thistle, is a subspecies of thistle plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion, bloating, and gas. The health benefits of Carlina vulgaris subsp. spinosa include its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to alleviate menstrual cramps, sore muscles, and joint pain. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, are commonly used to treat digestive issues and relieve respiratory problems, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine.
